_description: Semantic alias groups used by AbbreviationExpanderService to broaden embedding coverage. When an expanded table/column name contains a key word (e.g. 'employee'), all listed aliases are injected into the embedding text so queries using synonyms (e.g. 'workers', 'staff', 'headcount') still match the correct schema chunks. Keys are the canonical English word; values are arrays of synonyms.

employee._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'employee'

customer._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'customer'

order._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'order'

product._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'product'

account._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'account'

vendor._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'vendor'

category._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'category'

transaction._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'transaction'

revenue._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'transaction'

headcount._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'headcount'

recent orders._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'recent orders'

inventory._comment: Matches tables/columns whose expanded name contains 'inventory'
